mentions.surface: omnes enim Achaici deprecatores
itemque in Asia quibus non erat ignotum
in Africam dicuntur navigaturi
ita praeter Laelium neminem habeo culpae socium
all those in Achaia who were pleading for pardon
likewise in Asia those who were not pardoned
are said to be on the point of sailing to Africa
apart from Laelius I have no partner in my fault
ad Balbum et ad Oppium scripserit
et ad Oppium scripserit
praesertim hoc genero
he has written to Balbus and Oppius
written to Balbus and Oppius
especially with this son-in-law of mine
Quintus pergit, ut ad me et Pansa scripsit et Hirtius
ut ad me et Pansa scripsit
et Hirtius
isque item Africam petere cum ceteris dicitur
ad Minucium Tarentum scribam
Minucium Tarentum
Quintus is pressing on
as both Pansa and Hirtius have written to me
Pansa and Hirtius have written to me
he too is said to be making for Africa with the rest
I shall write to Minucius at Tarentum
Minucius at Tarentum
